business.name: Westlake Coffee Shop
business.tagline: A Daly City diner — eggs, burgers, pupusas, huevos rancheros, and a rib eye for dinner. The kind of place where the neighborhood actually eats.
business.subtitle: Diner & Coffee
business.parking_note: Free parking in the plaza lot — pull right in.
business.pickup_note: Order ahead and skip the wait — ready when you walk in.

todays_special: Today: Huevos Rancheros — eggs, ranchero sauce, avocado, feta, beans, tortilla $18

what_we_serve.title: Breakfast all day
what_we_serve.blurb: Egg plates, eleven omelettes, benedicts, pancakes, crepes, huevos rancheros, breakfast latino, loco moco — and pupusas. The full morning lineup.

what_we_serve.title: Lunch
what_we_serve.blurb: Burgers on the griddle, the club, our patty melt, Philly cheesesteak, the special reuben, and big crisp salads.

what_we_serve.title: Dinner
what_we_serve.blurb: Rib eye, grilled salmon, fried chicken, spaghetti & meatballs, orange chicken — Thursday through Sunday evenings.

family_story.heading: A neighborhood diner, run by a family.
family_story.body: Westlake Coffee Shop is the corner where Daly City actually eats. Eggs and omelettes in the morning, pupusas at lunch, a Philly cheesesteak when you can't decide, huevos rancheros when you're hungover, a rib eye on Friday night. We're family-owned and operated — the person taking your order is the same person checking the griddle, and probably the same person who'll remember how you like your coffee next time. Pull up to the counter, grab a booth, or stop in for a quick bite. We're glad you're here.
